heading: Definitions
label: 70301 Definitions
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7030146 App.:1807., , .Pub. L. 99–399, title IX, § 911100 Stat. 892Aug. 27, 1986In paragraph (2), the term “vessel of the United States” is omitted because the definition of that term in is being moved to chapter 1 of the revised title and will apply generally throughout the title.46 U.S.C. 2101In paragraph (3), the definition of “Secretary” is new. The functions of the Secretary of Transportation under this chapter were carried out by the Coast Guard, and its functions have been transferred to the Department of Homeland Security (except when operating as a service in the Navy) by section 888 of the Homeland Security Act of 2002 (, ).Pub. L. 107–296116 Stat. 2249

children.heading: .—Common carrier
children.label: 1 .—Common carrier
children.text: The term “common carrier” has the meaning given that term in .section 40102 of this title

children.heading: .—Passenger vessel
children.label: 2 .—Passenger vessel
children.text: The term “passenger vessel” has the meaning given that term in .section 2101 of this title

children.heading: .—Secretary
children.label: 3 .—Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating.
